home.greetingDesc: Find your favorite short dramas today.

footer.desc: Exclusive streaming platform for premium vertical short dramas. Enjoy thousands of episodes anytime, anywhere in HD quality.

about.title: About Us
about.desc: The best short drama streaming platform. We bring high-quality cinematic entertainment in a vertical format that fits perfectly in your hand.
about.heading: Unlimited Entertainment, Anytime, Anywhere.
about.p1: Vidplus+ video stream short drama provides exclusive short drama shows with various exciting genres. From heart-fluttering romance, thrilling action, to puzzling mysteries.
about.p2: Enjoy the flexibility of watching according to your style. Get full free access to explore exciting stories, or choose a premium paid option for an ad-free viewing experience and exclusive access to the latest episodes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: Have questions or need help? The Vidplus+ team is ready to assist you.
